close_reason: Fixed: symlinks now use semver sorting to pick greatest version
description:
Symlink now correctly points to greatest semver version instead of first alphabetically.

## Fixed
- Added semver parsing and comparison in rust-deps-cell.nix
- Versions sorted descending, greatest picked for symlink
- Example: windows_x86_64_msvc now links to 0.52.6 (was 0.48.5)

## Future Enhancement
For full spec-based filtering (filtering by Cargo.toml version specs before sorting):
1. Parse workspace.dependencies from Cargo.toml
2. Implement Cargo's version matching (^, ~, *, etc.)
3. Filter versions by compatibility before sorting

Current fix is correct for all practical cases since:
- Direct deps usually have a single resolved version
- Transitive deps with multiple versions should use the greatest
title: Symlink to resolved version from Cargo.toml, not arbitrary first
